name: opensims

metadata.name: openSIMS
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v3 (LGPLv3)
metadata.summary: A Python package for SIMS data reduction

documentation:
# openSIMS

Python package for SIMS data reduction

## Installation

```
python -m pip install openSIMS --upgrade
```

## Usage

From the Python REPL:

```
import openSIMS as S
S.gui()
```

Click on the 'Log' button of the GUI to see what's going on.

Example data are provided in the [data](https://github.com/pvermees/openSIMS/tree/main/data) folder of the GitHub repository.

functions.name: openSIMS.API.Ellipse.xzyz2ellipse
documentation: x, y and z are lists of raw data

functions.name: openSIMS.API.Ellipse.xy2ellipse
documentation: x and y are lists of logratios

functions.name: openSIMS.API.Cameca.clean_list
documentation: removes leading and trailing spaces from list of strings

functions.name: openSIMS.API.Cameca.string2float
documentation: cleans list of strings and converts it to a list of floats
